summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapRoad new features completed. Backend: 22/22 API tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new modals working (Friends Hub, Leaderboard, Badges Grid, Car Studio). All features accessible from hamburger menu.
critical_code_review_comments: React Router future flag warnings present - consider adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags (minor, non-blocking)
test_credentials: No authentication required. Sample user IDs: 123456, 123457, 123458, 123500
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data with 100+ generated users for leaderboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. New modals accessible from hamburger menu: Friends Hub (SOCIAL section), Leaderboard (SOCIAL section), All Badges (REWARDS section), Car Studio (REWARDS section). MOCKED: All data is in-memory mock data - no database connected.

features: User ID displayed in Friends Hub
My Friends tab shows friend list
Find Friends tab with 6-digit ID search
Search returns user with safety score, level, state
Shows user rank, level, badges count
6 category filters (Distance, Safety, Community, Streak, Achievement, Special)
Badge detail modal with description, gems reward, progress
Skin rarity levels (common, uncommon, rare, epic, legendary)

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/leaderboard - Get all users ranked by safety score
GET /api/leaderboard?state={state} - Get leaderboard filtered by state
GET /api/user/profile - Get user profile with 6-digit ID
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. 100+ fake users generated for leaderboard. 160 badges defined. 8 cars and 16 skins defined. No external services or database integrated.
